_meta.purpose: Pinned-reference SHA-256 hashes for calibration-ledger.json blocks (spec section 6.1 forward-only invariant). Each block hash is content-addressable via json.dumps(block, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":")). retrospective_attribution_audit_gate refuses any release where a current block hash differs from its pinned reference; new blocks are tolerated until pinned.
amendments: 2026-06-09: pinned the 2026-06-04 block (calibration Block 4, west/SSD corridor expansion) after restoring it byte-faithfully from the published 2026-06-06 snapshot artifact during the June-7 lineage repair. The risk_adj_50 ranges and content-addressed point ids are the authentic 2026-06-04 pins (published live 2026-06-06); this hash locks them forward-only. No existing block was altered.
